registry.name: release-check
registry.purpose: Run the §11 release gate — Playwright suite + provenance validator + §11.5 editorial read-through. Read-only audit.
registry.sources: all (read-only across `site-data.json` and every rendered page)

registry.name: stream-1-activation-monitor
registry.purpose: Drive the Stream 1 registered-but-inert sources from `pending_first_extraction` → live via `monitor_sources.py`. Currently wired for IR pages (src-026..032), SEC EDGAR broad scan (src-025 + data/edgar-tickers.json), FLI EU AI Act (src-055), Chinese sources (src-037/038/042), and the four Chinese hyperscaler IRs (src-056..059).
registry.fieldsTouched: none during catalogue pass; `data-updates/<date>-candidates.json` + `data-updates/<date>-source-<id>.json` patches for downstream Accept/Decline in `claims.html` (existing flow).
registry.cadence: on-demand (manually triggered per source via `python3 scripts/monitor_sources.py --force src-NNN`)

registry.name: structured-claims-applier
registry.purpose: Accept-side routing of the four wq-014 structured claim types (power_project / hiring_snapshot / patent_snapshot / company_surfaced) from `claims.html` into `site-data.json` / `companies.json`. Not a monitor — runs when Simon clicks Submit in claims.html.
registry.sources: any source that emits a structured claim (Streams 2/3 adapters in future; manual CLI today)
registry.outputSchema: patched `site-data.json` / `companies.json` via the existing `apply_claims.py` flow; row-per-write on `sources.log.md`

registry.name: stream-2-power-monitor
registry.purpose: Drive Stream 2 power sources from `pending_first_extraction` → live. Emits `power_project` structured claims (wq-014) per ISO queue entry. Consults `data/datacenter-attribution-map.json` for LLC / facility → AI-operator resolution.
registry.sources: src-060 (ERCOT), src-061 (PJM), src-062 (EIA), src-063 (NESO TEC), src-064 (Epoch AI)
registry.outputSchema: structured `power_project` claims → reviewed in `claims.html` → routed by `structured-claims-applier` into `site-data.json.power.projects[]`
registry.status: active (attribution map seeded 2026-04-23; no queue extractions yet)

registry.name: company-discovery
registry.purpose: Drive Stream 3 hiring + patent discovery. Fans out to per-company ATS endpoints (Greenhouse / Lever / Ashby / Workable) and patent APIs (PatentsView, optionally BigQuery / EPO OPS). Emits `hiring_snapshot`, `patent_snapshot`, and `company_surfaced` structured claims (wq-014). Consults `data/company-alias-map.json` for entity resolution.
registry.fieldsTouched: `data-updates/<date>-source-<id>.json` (per-source candidates, one per company target) + `data/company-alias-map.json` (updated as candidates are accepted) + `data/snapshots/<source-id>-<slug>/<YYYY-MM-DD>/`
registry.cadence: on-demand (manual trigger: `python3 scripts/monitor_sources.py --force src-NNN`; recommended cadence per wq-013 §7: weekly for ATS, monthly for patents)
registry.status: active (alias map seeded with 31-company validation set; no ATS or patent extractions yet)
